meaning: n.伯利恒(耶路撒泠南方六英里一市镇,耶稣诞生地)
examples: After him, Ibzan of Bethlehem led Israel.
Then Ibzan died, and was buried in Bethlehem.
May you have standing in Ephrathah and be famous in Bethlehem.
Abu Qatada was born in Bethlehem in 1960 and spent his early life in Jordan.
He also covered the Israeli siege of the Church of the Nativity in Bethlehem in May 2002.
